{{Quote|I speak for myself. My name is Rolanda Gron, and you will learn nothing from me.|Rolanda Gron's last words|<ref name="Dark Forces: Rebel Agent">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref>}}
'''Rolanda Gron''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] technologist who worked for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
After the Rebellion was a successful in bringing a critical blow to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and transforming to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qu Rahn/Legends|Qu Rahn]] assembled a team in order to discover the mythical [[Valley of the Jedi]] and Gron joined him as an expert.

On a [[Mission to Dorlo|mission]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dorlo]] a [[5 ABY/Legends|year after]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|battle]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], the team recruited linguist [[Nij Por Ral]], but on their way back to [[Duno Dree's transport]] they had to leave their [[Skimmer/Legends|skimmer]] behind, pursued by [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] forces. [[Cee Norley]] requested to stop to take a breath, and criticised Rahn's strategy to reach their ship on foot, as the team wasn't up to the task, and mentioning Gron as a mere technologist. Gron reacted, saying that it was her who requested to stop.<ref name="AD">[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]]</ref>

Eventually the ship was intercepted and the team was captured aboard the [[Vengeance (Imperial-class, Jerec)|''Vengeance'']]. During the capture Gron suffered a cut wound that caused bleeding.<ref name="Dark Forces: Rebel Agent" /> When Rahn joined them in the brig, Gron expressed his worry about what they were going to do them.<ref name="AD" />

[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sysco]] with some [[Imperial_commando/Legends|Imperial commandos]] brought the party to the ship's [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] before Jerec. The Dark Jedi showed curiosity about the party, when Gron stepped forward, saying beforehand that he will reveal nothing to him. Seeing his defiance, Jerec made an example by ordering his death; [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Gorc]], ridden by [[Picaroon C. Boodle]] approaced him; Gron would drop back if he wasn't held by the guards. Pic jumped on him and slit his throat with a dagger, let his body drop, and then wiped his dagger on the dead technologist's clothes.<ref name="Dark Forces: Rebel Agent" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the audio adaptation of [[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'']], he was voiced by [[Tom Keith]].
